format: ESRI ASCII Grid (.asc) — loadable in QGIS as raster
description: NDVI derived from Sentinel-2 synthetic imagery (June 2023, peak monsoon). Range -0.1 (water/urban) to 0.85 (dense forest). Proxy for satellite imagery layer.
source: Synthetic — modelled after SRTM/CartoDEM structure for Kamrup district
